ao-flywheel-close.sh.replacement: CloseoutPort or explicit ao closeout flywheel step
ao-flywheel-close.sh.rationale: Closeout is valuable, but it should be operator-visible and explicit in hookless 3.0.

side_effects: warns on commit messages without sibling-pattern citation
check-sibling-citation-on-commit.sh.rationale: Commit-quality checks are deterministic gates and should move behind a port.

side_effects: warns on commits without test-pair evidence
check-test-pair-on-commit.sh.rationale: Test-pair policy is a validation concern, not a prompt hook concern.

codex-parity-warn.sh.replacement: HarnessPort parity compiler plus CI validation lane
side_effects: warns when Codex runtime artifacts may be stale
codex-parity-warn.sh.rationale: Codex parity belongs in the runtime projection compiler and CI gate.

side_effects: blocks or warns on weak commit review evidence
commit-review-gate.sh.rationale: Commit review is an evidence gate and should be explicit.

side_effects: runs compile defrag at session end
compile-session-defrag.sh.rationale: Useful maintenance should subscribe to typed closeout events instead of hidden lifecycle hooks.

config-change-monitor.sh.rationale: Configuration observation is a runtime event sink.

context-guard.sh.replacement: ContextCompilerPort budget check before context delivery
context-guard.sh.rationale: Context pressure should be measured inside context assembly, not injected on every prompt.

context-monitor.sh.rationale: Telemetry should be non-resident and event-shaped.

dangerous-git-guard.sh.rationale: Destructive-operation prevention has a clear safety lease.

edit-audit.sh.rationale: Edit telemetry should be an event sink, not a prompt-time hook.

edit-knowledge-surface.sh.rationale: Knowledge-surface mutation policy is a validation gate.

edit-scope-guard.sh.rationale: Edit scope is a deterministic safety policy.

factory-router.sh.replacement: OperatorPort intent router or explicit ao route command
side_effects: routes operator prompts to factory workflows
factory-router.sh.rationale: Prompt routing should become explicit operator intent, not ambient prompt mutation.

side_effects: blocks git writes from worker contexts
git-worker-guard.sh.rationale: Worker authority is a safety policy.

side_effects: runs Go complexity checks after edits
runs Go tests before commit commands
go-test-precommit.sh.rationale: Tests belong in explicit validation lanes.

go-vet-post-edit.sh.rationale: Static analysis is a validation lane.

holdout-isolation-gate.sh.rationale: Holdout isolation is deterministic safety policy.

side_effects: blocks git writes from non-lead workers
lead-only-worker-git-guard.sh.rationale: Worker authority is a safety policy.

postedit-codex-refresh.sh.rationale: Projection refresh belongs in the harness compiler.

pre-mortem-gate.sh.rationale: Plan risk checks are validation gates.

precompact-snapshot.sh.rationale: Compaction preservation is an event subscriber.

quality-signals.sh.rationale: Feedback capture should be a typed event stream.

research-loop-detector.sh.rationale: Research-loop detection should observe phase events.

session-end-maintenance.sh.replacement: CloseoutPort or explicit ao closeout command
session-end-maintenance.sh.rationale: Session closeout should be explicit and reproducible.

session-start.sh.rationale: Startup context is the main token-risk candidate and must become explicit assembly.

standards-injector.sh.rationale: Standards should be pulled by phase/surface need, not injected on every edit.

stop-auto-handoff.sh.replacement: CloseoutPort or explicit ao handoff command
stop-auto-handoff.sh.rationale: Handoffs should be explicit closeout artifacts.

stop-team-guard.sh.rationale: Team lifecycle protection is a runtime safety policy.

subagent-stop.sh.rationale: Subagent lifecycle should be modeled as runtime events.

update-principles-check.sh.rationale: Update-principles compliance is a validation lane.

worktree-cleanup.sh.rationale: Worktree lifecycle belongs behind a workspace adapter.

worktree-setup.sh.rationale: Worktree lifecycle belongs behind a workspace adapter.

citation-tracker.sh.replacement: EventBusPort subscriber for artifact.read and citation.recorded
side_effects: records passive citations for .agents knowledge reads
citation-tracker.sh.rationale: Citation tracking is useful observability, but hooks/hooks.json and hooks/codex-hooks.json do not currently wire passive PostToolUse(Read) citation tracking.

ratchet-advance.sh.replacement: RatchetPort next-action suggestion or explicit ao ratchet next command
side_effects: suggests next lifecycle action after successful ratchet records
ratchet-advance.sh.rationale: This hook is active in the Codex manifest but not the main hook manifest; its additionalContext behavior needs token-value evidence before remaining default-on.
